review_coverage.notes: Exhaustive source-first continuation of the same active verifier after attempt-2 blocker STM-CHK5-001. Re-reviewed the repaired runtime history-match path in `runtime_state.hpp`, `perception_frontend.cpp`, and `steering_media_service.cpp`; refreshed local tests passed; the repaired board bundle now shows sustained steering-media delivery near the configured 80 ms cadence (65 total frames, 50 RUNNING frames, RUNNING host receive intervals 77-94 ms with 85.7 ms mean); the refreshed disconnect bundle still shows ACK/state cleanup surviving the forced steering-media drop; and the host-monotonic alignment bundle remains intact and reviewable.
